title: Run Python Script
summary: Run a Python script with no extra arguments.

title: Run Python Script with Arguments
summary: Run a Python script passing positional args and named --key value pairs.
oce_text:
[["python-wrapper::run_script"]]
script = "./process.py"
args = ["input.csv"]

["python-wrapper::run_script".kwargs]
output = "results.csv"
verbose = "true"

output_dir = "./outputs/py-run"
trust_acknowledged = true

title: Run Python Script in Virtualenv
summary: Run a Python script using a project-local virtual environment instead of the system Python.
